findings.annotation_source: Supplementary Table 3 provides DEGs used to annotate Capillaries in prenatal skin. Listed as fine-grained annotation under broad 'Vascular endothelium' category.
findings.trajectory: Capillaries are positioned early on the arteriolar differentiation pathway: early endothelial cells -> capillaries -> capillary arterioles -> arterioles (Fig. 4d, Extended Data Fig. 10a-c).
findings.sprouting_angiogenesis: Sprouting angiogenesis potential, assessed by scoring the 'tip' cell state, is increased in prenatal skin capillary cells (Extended Data Fig. 10g,h).
findings.macrophage_interactions: Macrophage subsets interact with capillary endothelial cells. Aggregated macrophage-endothelial ligand-receptor interactions were assessed (Extended Data Fig. 9a, Supplementary Table 28).
findings.temporal_presence: Endothelial cells are present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d, Supplementary Table 4).
